site.title: Volunteer Network
site.tagline: Together for the reconstruction of Venezuela
site.description: Volunteer Network for the reconstruction of Venezuela. Join, donate, and participate in our events.

hero.badge: Volunteer network in CABA for Venezuela
hero.title: Volunteer network in CABA for Venezuela
hero.description: We are a community of Venezuelans and Argentines organizing events, collecting donations, and providing support to earthquake victims in Venezuela.

about.title: Volunteer Network in CABA
about.description: A group of people committed to humanitarian aid, organizing events and campaigns to support communities affected by the earthquake in Venezuela from Buenos Aires City.
about.card_1_description: We work together to provide support to those who need it most, coordinating efforts and resources.
about.card_2_description: We plan events and campaigns efficiently to maximize the impact of our actions.
about.card_3_description: We build a support network of volunteers, donors, and organizations committed to the cause.

calendar.title: Upcoming
calendar.no_results: No upcoming events. Check back soon.

volunteer.description: Fill out the form and we will contact you to assign you to activities that best match your skills and availability.

donations.title: Your contribution matters
donations.description: With your donation you help affected communities rebuild their lives. Every bit counts.

footer.tagline: Together for the reconstruction of Venezuela
footer.description: We are a community of Venezuelans and Argentines in CABA organizing events, collecting donations, and supporting earthquake victims in Venezuela.
